name: Orange Champagne Cocktail
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the champagne, ginger ale, and orange juice into a mixing glass filled with ice.
2. Stir gently until well combined.
3. Strain the mixture into a champagne flute or coupe glass.
4. Float the frozen strawberries on top of the cocktail.
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, strictly avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
